ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomes" (
  "genome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genome */,
  "genome_name" TEXT /* Name of the genome */,
  "accession" TEXT /* Accession number of the genome */,
  "patric_id" TEXT /* PATRIC ID of the genome */,
  "genome_type" TEXT /* Type of the genome (e.g., complete, draft) */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the genome */,
  "strain" TEXT /* Strain of the genome */,
  "sequence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the genome sequence */,
  "sequence_md5" TEXT /* MD5 checksum of the genome sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "genome_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genome the feature belongs to */,
  "refseq_locus_tag" TEXT /* RefSeq Locus Tag of the feature */,
  "alt_locus_tag" TEXT /* Alternative Locus Tag of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the genomic feature (e.g., CDS, gene) */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the feature */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the feature */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the feature */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand orientation of the feature */,
  "figfam_id" TEXT /* FIGfam ID of the feature */,
  "plfam_id" TEXT /* PATRIC genus-specific family ID (PLfams) */,
  "pgfam_id" TEXT /* PATRIC cross-genus family ID (PGfams) */,
  "protein_id" TEXT /* Protein ID associated with the feature */,
  "aa_length" INTEGER /* Length of the protein in amino acids */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Gene symbol associated with the feature */,
  "product" TEXT /* Product description of the feature */,
  "go" TEXT /* Gene Ontology (GO) terms associated with the feature */,
  "ec_number" TEXT /* EC number of the feature */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., enzyme, transporter) */,
  "feature_sub_type" TEXT /* Sub-type of the feature (e.g., rRNA, tRNA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_plfam_id FOREIGN KEY ("plfam_id") REFERENCES plfams ("plfam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_pgfam_id FOREIGN KEY ("pgfam_id") REFERENCES pgfams ("pgfam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_genome_id FOREIGN KEY ("genome_id") REFERENCES genomes ("genome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_feature_type FOREIGN KEY ("feature_type") REFERENCES feature_types ("feature_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_strand FOREIGN KEY ("strand") REFERENCES strands ("strand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_figfam_id FOREIGN KEY ("figfam_id") REFERENCES figfams ("figfam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature the annotation belongs to */,
  "annotation_source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_score" REAL /* Score of the annotation (e.g., confidence level) */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., validated, predicted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_types" (
  "feature_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature type */,
  "feature_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature type */,
  "feature_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the feature type (e.g., coding, non-coding) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strands" (
  "strand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strand orientation */,
  "strand_name" TEXT /* Name of the strand orientation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strand orientation */,
  "strand_orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the strand (e.g., forward, reverse) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "figfams" (
  "figfam_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each FIGfam */,
  "figfam_name" TEXT /* Name of the FIGfam */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the FIGfam */,
  "figfam_category" TEXT /* Category of the FIGfam (e.g., enzyme, transporter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("figfam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plfams" (
  "plfam_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each PATRIC genus-specific family */,
  "plfam_name" TEXT /* Name of the PATRIC genus-specific family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the PATRIC genus-specific family */,
  "plfam_category" TEXT /* Category of the PATRIC genus-specific family (e.g., enzyme, transporter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plfam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pgfams" (
  "pgfam_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each PATRIC cross-genus family */,
  "pgfam_name" TEXT /* Name of the PATRIC cross-genus family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the PATRIC cross-genus family */,
  "pgfam_category" TEXT /* Category of the PATRIC cross-genus family (e.g., enzyme, transporter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pgfam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature the protein belongs to */,
  "aa_sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "function" TEXT /* Function of the protein */,
  "protein_length" INTEGER /* Length of the protein in amino acids */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the protein */,
  "isoelectric_point" REAL /* Isoelectric point of the protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proteins_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_symbols" (
  "gene_symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene symbol */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature the gene symbol belongs to */,
  "symbol_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene symbol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene symbol */,
  "gene_symbol_type" TEXT /* Type of the gene symbol (e.g., official, alias) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_symbols_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product description */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature the product description belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., enzyme, transporter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "go_terms" (
  "go_term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GO term */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature the GO term belongs to */,
  "go_term_name" TEXT /* Name of the GO term */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the GO term */,
  "go_aspect" TEXT /* Aspect of the GO term (e.g., biological process, molecular function) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("go_term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_go_terms_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)
